  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BaseItem
    BaseItem for other item to extends this class
    BaseItemTest
    Test Class for checking baseItem
    BasePlayer
    this class is the baseClass for PlayerType like Gymbro , Nerd , NormalGuy , Otaku that have same method to use with.
    BasePlayerProductionTest
    Test Class for checking basePlayer
    Book1
    Book1 (high school book) class extends from BaseItem
    Book1Test
    Test Class for checking Book1Test
    Book2
    Book2 (Bachelor Book) class extends from BaseItem
    Book2Test
    Test Class for checking Book2
    Book3
    Book3 (Master Book) class extends from BaseItem
    Book3Test
    Test Class for checking book3
    Book4
    Book4 (Doctorate Book) class extends from BaseItem
    Book4Test
    Test Class for checking book4
    Building
    Base class for all buildings in the game.
    Category
    this class Category
    CategoryTest
    Test Class for checking Category
    CharacterType
    ENUM for characterType
    CharacterTypeTest
    Test Class for checking CharacterType
    ChoosingScreen
    Screen for ChoosingScreen
    Chula
    Building entry for "Chula".
    ChulaPopup
    Popup screen for studying and unlocking education levels.
    Dome
    Building entry for "Dome".
    DomePopup
    Popup screen for dormitory actions (sleep/relax).
    EducationThing
    this Class initialize EducationThing like Book
    EducationThingTest
    Test Class for checking EducationThing
    Gamebar
    Gamebar on top screen to use method of this game
    GamePaneImage
    this class this for setup game logic and map logic
    GameScreen
    GameScreen set Layer and placing of this game
    GameSession
    this class connect between PlayerCreate and GamePane
    GameSessionTest
    Test Class for GameSessionTest
    Gym
    Building entry for "Gym".
    GymBro
    Gymbro class extends from BasePlayer Gymbro that have special interact with gym building
    GymBroTest
    Test Class for checking Gymbro method
    GymPopup
    Popup screen for gym services (workouts and a unique protein item).
    HealthThing
    this Class initialize HealthThing like WheyProtein
    HealthThingTest
    Test Class for checking HealthThing
    HowToPlayScreen
    How to play Screen
    Item
    this Class use for store item in player
    ItemInventoryTest
    Test Class for checking ItemInventory
    JavaFxTestBase
    Initializes the JavaFX toolkit once for tests that construct JavaFX classes (e.g., Image).
    main
    Main class to start application
    Mall
    Building entry for "Mall".
    MallPopup
    Popup screen for buying mall items and working for money.
    MapCreate
    Class for initialize map image in GamePane
    Nerd
    Nerd class extends from BasePlayer Nerd that have special interact with Chula building
    NerdTest
    Test Class for checking Nerd method
    Normal
    Helper interface that provides common UI building methods.
    NormalGuy
    NormalGuy class extends from BasePlayer NormalGuy that have noting special but the stat is balance
    NormalGuyTest
    Test Class for checking NormalGuy method
    Otaku
    Otaku class extends from BasePlayer Otaku that have special interact with Mall building
    OtakuTest
    Test Class for checking Otaku method
    Park
    Building entry for "Park".
    ParkPopup
    Popup screen for park activities (walk/relax).
    PlayerCreate
    this class use to initialize player to connect with gamePane in package logic to create character
    PlayerCreateTest
    Test Class for checking PlayerCreate method
    Restaurant
    Building entry for "Restaurant".
    RestaurantPopup
    Popup screen for buying food and working at the restaurant.
    ResultScreen
    Result Screen show when game end
    ScreenManager
    Manages switching between different screens in the game.
    Shopable
    Helper interface for popups that show a list of purchasable/selectable ShopItems.
    ShopItem
    Represents an item or action that can be shown as a button in a shop-style popup.
    SoundManager
    Class that Create Sound and control sound
    StatusTab
    StatusTab on Right screen to see status of this game
    TitleScreen
    The main title screen of the game.
    ToastUtil
    ToastUtil append when Bonus is active
    Travel
    Building entry for "Travel".
    TravelPopup
    Popup screen for traveling to destinations.
    UIUtil
    UItil for create pixelFont
    Vehicle
    this Class initialize Vehicle
    VehicleTest
    Test Class for checking Vehicle
    WheyProtein
    this Class initialize WheyProtein
    WheyProteinTest
    Test Class for checking WheyProtein
